title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: A local builder is going to repair our roof next week.
questions.afterGap: by a local builder next week.

questions.firstSentence: ‘You should avoid eating too much junk food,’ said the doctor.
questions.explanation: Tests reporting verbs with infinitive or prepositional gerund structures.

questions.firstSentence: I'm sorry I didn't see you at the party.
questions.explanation: Tests 'wish' + past perfect for past regrets.

questions.firstSentence: It is possible that the cat was trapped in the garage.
questions.explanation: Tests modal perfect passive for past possibility.

questions.firstSentence: I didn't realize my phone was missing until I got home.
The match was so exciting that I didn't want it to end.
questions.afterGap: that I didn't want it to end.
